messages.content: Refine this image prompt with more easy-to-understand text and better visual details: An epic intergalatic space war against aliens and humans with dystopian spaceships, lasers, star wars, avengers endgame, army, crowded, guns, stars rocks, epic, nebula, galaxy, bright, fog, explosive, colorful, 3d render, high quality pbr, highly detailed, ray traced reflections, photograph, cinematic, photorealistic, hyperrealistic, octane render, cinema 4d, unreal engine 5, lumen global illumination, 32k, bloom

Get ready for an exciting image prompt! Picture an epic battle in outer space between aliens and humans. The war is fought using high-tech, dystopian spaceships, powerful lasers, and futuristic guns. The scene is crowded with both alien and human armies, as they fight to save their respective planets. The war takes place among dazzling stars and rocky space debris, in the midst of a stunning, vibrant nebula. Bright and explosive colors fill the scene, making it a 3D render that is highly detailed and photorealistic. The image is brought to life using ray traced reflections, 32k resolution, and hyper-realistic features, like bloom effects and global illumination. The cinematic quality of the image is achieved through the use of powerful rendering tools such as Octane, Cinema 4D, and Unreal Engine 5 with Lumen. This is a scene that makes "Star Wars" and "Avengers Endgame" battles look like child's play.
Shorten the prompt for it to be used with AI image generators

Epic space battle with aliens and humans using high-tech spaceships, lasers, and guns. Crowded with armies, vibrant nebula, bright colors. Highly-detailed, photorealistic 3D render with cinematic quality.
create and refine with great details an image prompt with the text given: molang as a sith from star wars, unreal engine 5, photorealistic, cinematic lighting

Prepare for an epic crossover as we imagine Molang, the beloved animated character, as a Sith from the Star Wars universe! Using Unreal Engine 5's powerful capabilities, we can create an incredible, photorealistic 3D render. Molang is now adorned with iconic Sith robes, complete with a menacing, hooded cloak, and wielding a double-bladed red lightsaber. The scene is set with stunning cinematic lighting, carefully designed to bring out the intensity and darkness of the Sith. Rays of light from the lightsaber glimmer and reflect off of Molang's carved features, casting a dramatic shadow on the character's sinister expression. Meanwhile, the background is filled with mysterious and ominous shadows, giving the impression that Molang is on the verge of unleashing an unimaginable power. This is an image prompt that Star Wars fans need to see - the adorable Molang brought to life as a Sith, in a photorealistic 3D render that is unrivaled in its cinematic quality.
shorten the image prompt for use with an ai image generator
Molang as a Sith with double-bladed lightsaber, cinematic lighting. Photorealistic 3D render created using Unreal Engine 5.
Add background details to the AI image prompt

Molang, the cute animated character, is now transformed into a menacing Sith Lord. In the background, we see a dark, murky terrain that adds an extra layer of mystery and terror to the scene. Smoke and dust rise from the ground, shrouding everything in shadow and making the environment look chaotic. In the distance, we can see an eerie castle, looming menacingly against the dark sky. The castle's sharp spires and gothic architecture add to the ominous vibe of the image. Molang's Sith costume is highly-detailed, complete with a hooded cloak, a breathing apparatus, and other Sith accouterments. The double-bladed red lightsaber is the centerpiece of the image, with its glowing blade casting a red light on Molang's quivering ears, conveying the sense of danger and excitement. The cinematic lighting enhances the mood of the image, creating a sense of unease and tension that makes this an unforgettable image prompt.
Molang as a Sith with double-bladed lightsaber. Dark, ominous terrain with eerie castle in the distance. Cinematic lighting creates tension and unease.
Add cinematic lighting details into the AI image prompt

Behold as we bring to life Molang, the adorable animated character turned Sith Lord, in a stunning 3D render with cinematic lighting. The scene is set against a dark, ominous terrain shrouded in shadow, which adds a layer of mystery and terror to the image. The cinematic lighting highlights Molang's Sith costume and the double-bladed red lightsaber with a glowing, intense hue, casting dramatic shadows in all the right places. The lighting's careful calibration also sets the mood of the image, creating a perfect blend of tension and drama. From the Sith's breathing apparatus to Molang's quivering ears, the lighting's presence can be felt, heightening all the visual elements to their maximum potential. In the distance, the eerie castle creates an ominous atmosphere that intensifies the cinematic quality of the image, making Molang's transformation into the Sith even more epic!
shorten the prompt while keeping all of the essential details

Molang, the adorable character as Sith Lord with double-bladed lightsaber. The scene is set against dark terrain with eerie castle in the distance. Cinematic lighting adds intensity and drama, casting dramatic shadows on Molang and the lightsaber.

Refine the image prompt given, while keeping things short: An explosive and violent scene of soldiers running and damaged transport vehicles and tanks driving through a wintry landscape full of pine trees and destroyed townhouse buildings with clouds of dust and debris coming out. In the air, enemy fighter planes from behind are flying and shooting down at the soldiers. by Weta Digital, Cinematic, Photography, Photoshoot, DSLR, Nikon D750, Lens Flare, Cinecolor, 32k, Ultra-HD, Artificial Lighting, Cinematic Lighting,

Get ready for an explosive and gritty scene of soldiers fighting through a wintry landscape of pine trees and destroyed buildings. Tanks and transport vehicles are driving through the chaos as enemy fighters fly overhead, raining down destruction. This larger than life scene has been brought to life with the help of Weta Digital's high-quality cinematic photography, shot with a Nikon D750 DSLR for superior image clarity. Lens flare and Cinecolor add an additional layer of realism, making exploding debris cloud everything in sight. And if that wasn't enough, this image is rendered in 32k Ultra-HD and features artificial and cinematic lighting, further enhancing the intense and dramatic nature of the scene. Consider yourselves warned – this is an image prompt that is not to be missed!
